data.text: Novavax raises revenue forecast on boost from vaccine deals, shares soar
data.snippet: Novavax raised its adjusted revenue forecast for 2026 on Thursday, banking on milestone payments from licensing and supply deals for its shots, although it noted that the current regulatory environment posed a risk for vaccine companies.

image.text: An illustration photo shows a dose of Novavax Nuvaxovid COVID-19 vaccine in Schwenksville

data.text: Eli Lilly's weight-loss pill shows higher side effects than Novo rival in diabetes trial
data.snippet: Eli Lilly's experimental weight-loss pill, orforglipron, caused more side effects and treatment discontinuations than Novo Nordisk's oral semaglutide in a head-to-head diabetes trial, full results showed on Thursday.

image.text: FILE PHOTO: A drone view shows the Eli Lilly logo

data.text: CDC vaccine advisors to consider COVID-19 vaccine injuries, long COVID
data.snippet: The U.S. CDC's vaccine advisory committee will discuss and may vote on recommendations for issues including COVID-19 vaccine injuries and long COVID at its scheduled meeting on March 18 and 19, according to a notice in the Federal Register.

image.text: FILE PHOTO: Center for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) in Atlanta, Georgia, U.S.

data.text: Judge rejects Kenvue bid to dismiss Texas lawsuit over Tylenol safety
data.snippet: A Texas judge on Thursday rejected Kenvue's bid to dismiss a lawsuit by state Attorney General Ken Paxton accusing the company of failing to warn consumers that it may be unsafe for pregnant women to take Tylenol.

image.text: Kenvue Inc, Johnson & Johnson's consumer-health business, IPO at the NYSE in New York

data.text: Bayer's $7.25 billion proposed Roundup settlement faces first signs of pushback in court
data.snippet: Law firms representing nearly 20,000 people who sued Bayer over alleged injuries from its Roundup weedkiller urged a Missouri judge to delay reviewing the German company’s proposed $7.25 billion nationwide settlement, arguing that rushing would violate the rights of cancer patients and their families.

image.text: FILE PHOTO: Monsanto Co's Roundup shown for sale in California

data.text: China's Jiuyuan Genetic seeks approval for Wegovy biosimilar
data.snippet: Jiuyuan Genetic Biopharmaceutical has applied for approval to sell its experimental biosimilar version of Novo Nordisk's <NOVOb.CO> blockbuster weight-loss drug Wegovy in China, the Chinese drugmaker said Wednesday.

image.text: FILE PHOTO: Boxes of Novo Nordisk's weight-loss drug Wegovy

data.text: Social media addiction trial takes new turn with therapist's testimony
data.snippet: The former psychotherapist of a California woman suing Meta's Instagram and Alphabet's YouTube, claiming a childhood addiction to the platforms damaged her mental health, testified on Tuesday that adolescent social media usage was a contributing factor.

image.text: Trial in a case accusing Meta and Google's YouTube of harming children's mental health, in Los Angeles

data.text: Hikma Pharma's gloomy outlook kicks shares to more than three-year low
data.snippet: British generic drugmaker Hikma Pharmaceuticals scrapped its medium-term targets as it forecast slower annual revenue growth and profit on Thursday, sending its shares tumbling to their lowest levels since late 2022.

data.text: Kennedy ally Casey Means edges closer to US Surgeon General job
data.snippet: Wellness influencer Casey Means, a key ally of Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr., advanced toward confirmation as U.S. surgeon general on Wednesday as senators pressed her on contentious positions on vaccines and birth control.

image.text: Casey Means, nominated to serve as the next U.S. Surgeon General, testifies before a Senate Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions Committee confirmation hearing on Capitol Hill in Washington

data.text: US FDA approves first-line use of Boehringer Ingelheim's lung cancer drug
data.snippet: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration on Thursday approved Boehringer Ingelheim's zongertinib as a first-line treatment for a rare form of non-small cell lung cancer, making it the second drug to be cleared under the agency's new speedy review program.

image.text: FILE PHOTO: Signage is seen outside of FDA headquarters in White Oak, Maryland

data.text: Sarepta Therapeutics CEO Ingram to retire by year end
data.snippet: Sarepta Therapeutics CEO Douglas Ingram has decided to step down by the end of 2026 or upon the appointment of his replacement, the company said in a regulatory filing.

image.text: A sign marks the offices of Sarepta Therapeutics in Cambridge

data.text: South Carolina measles cases easing earlier than expected, health official says
data.snippet: South Carolina has reported a drop in measles cases over the past two weeks, an encouraging sign that the outbreak may be easing earlier than anticipated, a state health official said in a briefing on Wednesday.

image.text: A signage stands outside a South Carolina Department of Public Health Mobile Health Unit in Spartanburg

data.text: Novo Nordisk partners with Vivtex in up to $2.1 billion deal for oral obesity drugs
data.snippet: Danish drugmaker Novo Nordisk has partnered with U.S.-based Vivtex Corp in a deal worth up to $2.1 billion to develop next-generation oral drugs for obesity and diabetes, the companies said on Wednesday.

image.text: FILE PHOTO: The logo of pharmaceutical company Novo Nordisk is displayed in front of its offices in Bagsvaerd

data.text: GSK to buy 35Pharma for $950 million in CEO Miel's second major deal
data.snippet: GSK has agreed to pay $950 million in cash for Canadian biotech 35Pharma, it said on Wednesday, marking the second major deal new CEO Luke Miels has struck to accelerate development of new medicines at the British drugmaker.

data.text: Novartis to build radioligand therapy site in Texas to expand US manufacturing
data.snippet: Novartis said on Wednesday it intends to build a  radioligand therapy manufacturing site in Texas, expanding its U.S. footprint with what will be its first such facility in the state and fifth nationwide.

image.text: FILE PHOTO: The logo of Swiss drugmaker Novartis is pictured at the company's French headquarters in Rueil-Malmaison
